# Set up future payments

Learn how to save payment details in a Checkout session and charge your customers later.

## Index

This article has multiple variants. Fetch one of the following URLs to view specific content for your use case:

- [Full hosted page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/save-and-reuse.md?payment-ui=stripe-hosted)
- [Full embedded page](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/save-and-reuse.md?payment-ui=embedded-page)
- [Embedded form](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout/save-and-reuse.md?payment-ui=checkout-form)
